Annavaram

# Annavaram

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

![Ratnakar Sadasyula's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!R73I!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81a2c542-8b3f-4ade-98d2-a40950cffbe3_2640x1980.jpeg)

[Ratnakar Sadasyula](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Sep 29, 2021

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

1

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Share

Annavaram, famous for it's temple of Veera Venkata Satyanarayana Swamy, and is one of the prominent Punya Kshetras in Andhra Pradesh.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!JwTZ!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7c03a07b-c86d-4ad7-a5f9-9d3f57912555_360x216.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!JwTZ!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7c03a07b-c86d-4ad7-a5f9-9d3f57912555_360x216.jpeg)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!nb7f!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2a6df7c3-c347-448f-b035-e3f535951614_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!nb7f!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2a6df7c3-c347-448f-b035-e3f535951614_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!o3yL!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fa72c0ad9-4e8e-40fe-8236-68d0d835f28e_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!o3yL!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fa72c0ad9-4e8e-40fe-8236-68d0d835f28e_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Lying right on the Chennai-Kolkata highway, the temple is located on a hill called Ratnagiri, with the Pampa reservoir in the backdrop, giving it a picturesque look. The temple is one of the most visited in the Godavari districts, Uttarandhra region specifically.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!M_Sp!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F44bfe873-67aa-42e0-a59e-cd7b8a2dae40_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!M_Sp!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F44bfe873-67aa-42e0-a59e-cd7b8a2dae40_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!55hw!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb3802173-9cd5-49dd-ae06-c9023b350943_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!55hw!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb3802173-9cd5-49dd-ae06-c9023b350943_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Annavaram is believed to have got it's name from the fact that the deity Shree Satyanarayana Swamy, fulfils whatever boon is granted to devotees, Anina, Varam( boon) which in due course of time became Annavaram.

As per the Sthala Purana, the two sons of Meru- Bhadra and Ratnaka,did penace to Vishnu to reside on them. Bhadra became Bhadragiri/Bhadrachalam, where Vishnu descended as Shri Rama, while Ratnagiri, was where he settled as Veera Venkata Satyanarayana Swamy.

It's believed that Vishnu appeared in the dreams of the zamindar of Gorasa, Raja Inuganti Venkata Rama Raya, as well as a devout Brahmin, Eranki Prakasam, and told them to come to Ratnagiri on Shravana Shukla Vidiya, where they would could find him. As instructed both of them reached Ratnagiri on Shravana Shukla Vidiya , when they found the sun rays falling on a bush under an Anka tree. Digging up the bush, they found the murthy of Satyanarayana Swamy, which they immediately took up the hill.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!8Gy3!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F398650b2-3d87-4644-b58e-dbb070246eb1_300x168.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!8Gy3!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F398650b2-3d87-4644-b58e-dbb070246eb1_300x168.jpeg)

The murthy of Satyanarayana Swamy was installed in on August 6, 1891 in the presence of Sri Matripadibhutvi of Kashi, through the Maha Vaikunta Narayana Yantra. The actual temple was built around 1934, there are two small shrines of Shiva, Ganesha at entrance. The temple is located on the Ratnagiri hill at an altitude of 300 m above sea level, you can reach the temple through 460 steps, and there is also a ghat road going all the way up.

The Annavaram temple also has a large Kalyana Mandapam in it's premises, in fact many get married here, as it is considered auspicious. And on an auspicious date, it's common to find multiple marriages being conducted simultaneously.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!cd_Z!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F8ff6850e-54d0-4021-9c9f-0aec5da96871_680x408.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!cd_Z!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F8ff6850e-54d0-4021-9c9f-0aec5da96871_680x408.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_U0F!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc30e081a-bd88-4913-adff-157a5a1ea38a_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_U0F!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc30e081a-bd88-4913-adff-157a5a1ea38a_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

On a side note, the Annavaram Temple is also a destination for many runaway lovers, who often get married here in a simple ceremony.

The temple is shaped in the form of a Ratha when viewed from top, and consists of two stories. The main deity, Shree Satyanarayana Swamy is located in the upper half, about 4 meters tall.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!iYeY!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb3621628-337c-405d-9cbf-662c284db556_240x134.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!iYeY!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb3621628-337c-405d-9cbf-662c284db556_240x134.jpeg)

Satyanarayana Swamy is believed to represent Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva together. Hence while the Sanctum Sanctorum in the lower half, represents Vishnu, the middle half represents Shiva.

*Moolatho Brahmarupaya Madhyatascha Maheswaram Adhato Vishnu Rupaya, Tharkayaika Rupayatenamaha*.

Also the main deity here, has a moustache, one of the few Vishnu temples where he is depicted so. There is also a sundial here, as well as a Tulasivanam, and a beautiful garden where one can relax.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!g82f!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0681083c-2503-4772-8b8e-2b8179667dd5_360x270.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!g82f!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0681083c-2503-4772-8b8e-2b8179667dd5_360x270.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Also the view of the Pampa reservoir from the top of the temple, gives it a very picturesque feel, where one can just take in the views.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!KljQ!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F24b2279c-b3d5-4c44-ba09-c1601cdb0b1b_240x134.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!KljQ!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F24b2279c-b3d5-4c44-ba09-c1601cdb0b1b_240x134.jpeg)

And yes you just cannot miss the delicious prasadam offered at the Annavaram temple as good as the Tirupati Laddu. The best way to have it, is the traditional way, eating it straight from the leaf, nothing like it.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!b1Gu!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc89b4ef0-bafc-48e2-80ed-f04b6512f365_300x168.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!b1Gu!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc89b4ef0-bafc-48e2-80ed-f04b6512f365_300x168.jpeg)

It's rather picturesque location, has made the Annavaram temple a favorite with many movie makers. Some of the more well known movies shot here include Shankarabharanam, Mr and Mrs Shailaja Krishnamurthy and the recent Geeta Govindam. Also it's quite common to find many named as Veera Venkata Satyanarayana or with Veera Venkata in the start of their name, in the Godavari districts primarily, so named after the deity at Annavaram.

It also has a place in the freedom struggle, the legendary revolutionary Alluri Sitarama Raju took refuge in the forests nearby, to escape from the British. He also received a hero's welcome when he was seen here by the villagers.

Located on the Chennai-Kolkata highway, as well as the main railway line, Annavaram can be reached by road and rail. If you are travelling by flight, you can get down at either Vizag or Rajahmundry, from where it's around 2-3 hrs journey by road.

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

1
